question: A retail store wants to hire 50 new phone reps to assist with the increased call volume that they will experience over the holiday.  Each phone rep will work 8 hours a day.  After 5 days, how much will the company pay all 50 new employees?
Lana's favorite band was holding a concert. Lana bought 8 tickets for herself and her friends and several extra tickets in case anyone else wanted to go. How much did she spend?

At Esme's school, there are 30 teachers and 45 staff members. On a Monday morning, The Best Pizza Inn brought pizza for the staff and teachers as a promotion offer. If 2/3 of the teachers and 4/5 of the staff members ate Pizza, how many non-pizza eaters are at Esme's school?
For Halloween Sarah received 66 pieces of candy from neighbors and 15 pieces from her older sister. If she only ate 9 pieces a day, how long would the candy last her?

Alexander draws 9 pictures for an exhibition at a gallery. 5 new galleries also want Alexander to draw for them, so he draws pictures for their exhibitions too. Each of these new galleries receives the same amount of pictures. For each picture, Alexander needs 4 pencils. For each exhibition, he needs another 2 pencils for signing his signature on the pictures. If Alexander uses 88 pencils on drawing and signing his pictures for all of the exhibitions, how many paintings are at each of the 5 new galleries?

There are 14 caterpillars on the tree. 4 more eggs hatch, and baby caterpillars climb out to munch on the leaves.  8 fat caterpillars leave the tree to cocoon themselves to be butterflies.  How many caterpillars are left on the tree?
Nadine collected different colored pebbles. She has 20 white pebbles and half as many red pebbles. How many pebbles does she have in all?

Danny collects bottle caps and wrappers. He found some bottle caps and 2 wrappers at the park. Now he has 7 bottle caps and 86 wrappers in his collection. How many more bottle caps than wrappers did Danny find at the park?
Emily makes $1,000,000 per year. If she has 10 employees who make $20,000 per year.

Aunt Gemma has four dogs. She feeds them with dog food twice a day. Each dog can consume 250 of food per meal. If aunt Gemma bought 2 sacks of dog food, each weighing 50 kilograms, how many days will those food last?
3 birds were sitting on the fence. 2 more birds and 6 more storks came to join them..How many more storks than birds are sitting on the fence?
There were 13 friends playing a video game online when 8 players quit. If each player left had more than 6 lives, how many lives did they have total?
Mr. Smith has incurred a 2% finance charge because he was not able to pay on time for his balance. If he plans to settle his balance today, how much will Mr. Smith pay?
The sewers in Middleton can handle 240,000 gallons of run-off. Each hour of rain produces -1000 gallons of runoff. How many days of rain can the sewers handle before they overflow?
After resting they decided to go for a swim. The depth of the water is 5 times Ron's height. Dean is 11 feet shorter than Ron. If Ron stands at 12 feet.How deep was the water?

She sold twice as many boxes on Tuesday as she did on Wednesday, and she sold twice as many boxes on Wednesday as she did on Thursday. If Kim sold 1200 boxes of cupcakes on Thursday, how many boxes did she sell on Tuesday?

Patricia and Geoffrey went fishing to feed their group of campers. They caught an eight-pound trout, six two-pound bass, and two twelve-pound salmon. If each person will eat two pounds of fish, how many campers can they feed?

Jerry is at the library helping put away books. There are 34 book to put away total but a librarian takes 7 of them and leaves Jerry with the rest. If he can fit 3 books on a shelf, how many shelves will he need?
Jeremy listened to five fewer songs yesterday than today. Yesterday, he listened to nine songs. How many songs did Jeremy listen to in two days?
During the Arkansas and Texas tech game the Razorback shirt shop made $ 215 by selling 5 shirts..What is the cost of each shirt?

For the walls of the house he would use 12 large planks of wood and 17 small planks. If each large plank of wood needs some pieces of nails to be secured and each small plank needs four times number of nails than plank. How many planks does John need for the house wall?

When Michelle makes fresh pasta, she first makes the dough, then she rolls it out and cuts it, and then she hangs it on racks to dry for cooking later. She needs a drying rack for each three pounds of pasta she makes, and it takes two cups of flour to make each pound of pasta dough. She owns three racks right now. How many more drying racks will Michelle need if she makes pasta using three 8-cup bags of flour?

Ginger likes to make cakes for every holiday for people.  She has 2 children, each of whom she bakes a cake for on their birthdays, Christmas, Easter, and Halloween.  She has a husband for whom she makes a cake on these same holidays, as well as on their anniversary and Valentine's Day. Lastly, she makes both her parents cakes as well, but only for their birthdays since they live far away.  How many cakes does she make in total?
Ursula earns $8.50 an hour working in a restaurant. If she works 20 days a month, determine her annual salary.
Ned gave away part of his video games to a friend. Now Ned has six games. How many games did Ned have before he gave the games away?

Francine wants to know if a local chemical plant is releasing toxic waste that makes the frogs mutate. In one local pond, she catches 5 frogs with extra legs, 2 frogs with 2 heads, two frogs that are bright red, and 18 normal frogs. What percentage of the frogs have mutated, rounded to the nearest integer?
Vanessa had 13 music files and 30 video files on her flash drive. If she deleted 10 of the files, how many files were still on her flash drive?

Peggy buys 3 folders, one each in the colors red, green, and blue.  She puts ten sheets of paper in each folder, and then, she puts star-shaped stickers on each sheet of paper.  In the red folder, each sheet of paper gets 3 stickers.  In the green folder, each sheet of paper gets 2 stickers, and in the blue folder, each sheet gets 1 sticker.  What is the total number of stickers Peggy uses?
If there are several slices in a large pizza, how many slices will remain if Mary orders 2 large pizzas and eats 7 slices?
For Halloween Katie and her sister combined the candy they received. Katie had 8 pieces of candy while her sister had 23. If they ate 8 pieces the first night, how many pieces do they have left?
Alexa has a lemonade stand where she sells lemonade for $2 for one cup. If she spent $20 on ingredients, how many cups of lemonade does she need to sell to make a profit of $80?

Jeff makes 10 donuts each day for 12 days. Jeff eats one of the donuts each day. Chris then comes over and eats 8 donuts. If several donuts fit in each box, how many boxes can Jeff fill with his donuts?
Of the 600 students at River Falls High School, 3/4 of them play tennis. Of those that play tennis, 60% of them also play hockey. How many students play both hockey and tennis?
Faith is getting paid $13.50 per hour. She normally works 8 hours a day, 5 days a week, plus 2 hours of overtime per day. How much will she earn by the end of the week?
For the school bake sale Amy made pastries. She baked 15 cupcakes and 48 cookies. After the sale she had 12 to take back home. How many pastries did she sell?

Winston had 10 gallons of gas in his car’s gas tank. He drives to the store and uses 6 gallons of gas. Then he drives to the doctor’s office and uses 2 gallons of gas. If the tank can hold up to 12 gallons of gas, how many gallons of gas will Winston need to refill the entire tank?

A charity organization's goal is to distribute 400 boxes of food to a community that was recently destroyed by a flood. Each box contains $80 worth of food and $165 worth of additional supplies such as toiletries and fresh linens. Then, an anonymous donor gives the organization 4 times the amount of money they had already spent, allowing them to pack many more boxes. How many boxes do they pack in total?

Before getting to work, Jess has a few errands to run. Jess has to walk a few blocks to the store and less than 6 blocks to the gallery, before walking the final more than 8 blocks to arrive at work. If Jess has already walked 5 blocks, how many more blocks must she walk before arriving at work?

3000 bees hatch from the queen's eggs every day. If a queen loses 900 bees every day, how many total bees are in the hive (including the queen) at the end of 7 days if at the beginning the queen had 12500 bees?
It’s February 2021. Graham is 3 years younger than Mark, and Graham’s sister, Janice, is 1/2 the age of Graham.  How old is Janice?
An air conditioner running for eight hours would consume 7.2 kilowatts. How many kilowatts would the air conditioner consume if it was used for -6 hours a day for 5 days?

Jimmy's father receives 20 emails a day. Halfway through February, he subscribed to a news channel that sent 5 more emails per day to his email. What's the total number of emails Jimmy's father had at the end of the month?

A retail store wants to hire 50 new phone reps to assist with the increased call volume that they will experience over the holiday.  Each phone rep will work 8 hours a day and will be paid $14.00 an hour.  After 5 days, how much will the company pay all 50 new employees?

There were 3 dollars in Olivia's wallet. She collected 49 more dollars from an atm. After she visited a supermarket there were 49 dollars left..How much more money did she collect at the atm than she spent at the supermarket?
Max attended many college courses in 2 years. Sid attended four times as many college courses as Max in the same period. What's the total of college courses they both attended?

Corey downloaded two movie series from his Netflix account with 12 and 14 seasons per series, respectively. However, in the week, his computer got a mechanical failure, and he lost two episodes from each season for both series.How many episodes remained after the computer's mechanical failure?

A football club has a balance of $100 million. The club then sells some of its players at $10 million each, and buys 4 more at $15 million each. How much money is left in the club register in millions of dollars?

Liam wants to go to Paris, but first, he has to pay his bills. His trip costs $7,000, and his bills cost $3,500. Knowing that Liam has saved $500/month for many years, how much money will he have left after paying his bills?
He then went to see the oranges being harvested. He found out that they harvest 8 sacks per day..How many days will it take to harvest 24 sacks of oranges?
Rachel bought some new chairs and new tables for her house. If she spent 4 minutes on each piece furniture putting it together, how many minutes did it take her to finish?

At the gym, every day, there are 300 towels laid out for guest use.  Each guest is given several towel during their visit.  The gym is open from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. In the first hour, some guests enter the gym.  In the second hour, 20% more guests enter than during the first hour.  In the third hour, 25% more guests enter than in the second hour.  In the fourth hour, one third more guests enter than in the third hour.  In total, how many towels do they need to wash that evening?

During the Christmas holidays, all shops are closed for 3 days. During each day during this time, a shop called "Surprise"could have earned 5 thousand dollars. How much potential revenue did the "Surprise"shop lose during many years of activity?

It was Trevor's job to collect fresh eggs from the family's 4 chickens every morning.   He got some eggs from Gertrude and 3 eggs from Blanche.  Nancy laid 2 eggs as did Martha.  On the way, he dropped 2 eggs.  How many eggs did Trevor have left?

A vendor bought apples at 2 for $3 and plans to sell them at 5 for $10. He also bought 3 oranges for $2.70 and plans to sell them at $1 each. How much is his profit if he sells 5 apples and 5 oranges?
Faye was placing her pencils and crayons into 30 rows with 71 crayons and 24 pencils in each row..How many pencils does she have?
A vampire needs to suck 7 gallons of blood per week to survive.  If he sucks -2 pints of blood per person, how many people does he need to suck each day to survive?

In a factory, there are many employees. 200 of them earn $12 per hour. Of the rest, 40 of them earn $14 per hour. All others earn $17 per hour. What is the cost to employ all these people for one 8-hour long shift?

Tony has a bucket that holds 2 pounds of sand. He has a sandbox out back that is two feet deep, four feet wide, and 5 feet long. A cubic foot of sand weighs 3 pounds. Because it's hot outside, he wants to make sure he stays hydrated, so every 4 trips he takes he drinks 3 ounces of bottled water. A 15 ounce bottle of water costs $2. He has $10 with him. How much change will he have after he buys all the water he needs?
There were 39 girls and more than 4 boys trying out for the schools basketball team. If only 43 of them got called back, how many students didn't make the cut?
Baker made 144 cakes. He sold 71 of them. Then he made 111 more cakes..How many more cakes did baker make than those he sold?
